meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Marketing Automation Without Coding (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Master marketing automation without coding. An expert-level checklist for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-impact results fast.
content.answer_block: Stop wrestling with complex code stacks. By leveraging Antigravity for visual workflow orchestration and Claude Code for intelligent script generation, you can build production-grade marketing automation systems. This approach allows you to ship custom CRM integrations and automated lead-nurturing sequences in hours, not weeks, directly increasing your billable output.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is unforgiving. You are caught in a relentless cycle: clients demand high-velocity marketing automation, yet you are bottlenecked by the technical debt of manual implementation and a lack of deep coding expertise. The fear of breaking a production environment keeps you stagnant while your competitors automate their way to higher margins.

But the paradigm has shifted. You no longer need to be a software engineer to build sophisticated backend logic. By combining the visual orchestration power of Antigravity with the reasoning capabilities of Claude Code, you can bridge the gap between intent and execution. It is time to stop building from scratch and start orchestrating success.

steps.title: Define the Automation Logic
steps.description: Map out your lead lifecycle. Identify the trigger (e.g., new form submission) and the desired action (e.g., CRM update + slack notification).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a visual workflow that triggers on a webhook, parses JSON contact data, and routes it to a CRM API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a schema for lead capture based on this workflow map'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Backend Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scaffold the necessary environment files and API connection modules without manual configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate API connector for [Target CRM] using Node.js.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a secure, environment-variable-driven API client for CRM integration'

steps.title: Automate Data Transformation
steps.description: Clean and map your lead data. Ensure the incoming payload matches the CRM's expected format using AI-assisted mapping.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data transformation node that maps incoming webhook fields to standard CRM contact fields.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write a validation function to sanitize input strings for the CRM API'

steps.title: Implement Error Handling & Logging
steps.description: Don't let silent failures cost you clients. Automate alerts for failed API calls and log them to a central dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add an error-handling path that sends a notification to Slack when the CRM API returns a non-200 status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add robust try-catch blocks and Slack notification logic to the main handler'

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor Execution
steps.description: Push your workflow to production and monitor the execution logs within the Antigravity interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment environment and enable real-time execution logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a health-check script to verify connectivity between the CRM and the automation flow'

pro_tips: Always use a 'staging' webhook URL in Antigravity before moving to production to avoid flooding client CRM databases with test data.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your API connectors; even if you can't code, the tests act as a safety net for your logic.
Store all API keys in environment variables; never hardcode credentials into your workflow steps or scripts.
Implement a 'retry' policy on your API nodes to handle intermittent network issues automatically without human intervention.
Document your automation flow in a README file generated by Claude Code so your client can understand the logic you built.
content.next_steps: Once your first automation is live, focus on building a library of reusable workflow templates to reduce your future project setup time by 80%.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for manual labor and start selling high-value, automated systems that scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
